about.title: What can this calculate?
about.p1: Based on speedup days, this calculates possible troop count, power increase, and event points (Strongest Governor / Supreme Power / Strongest Kingdom Preparation Phase) when training new troops or promoting existing troops.
about.li3: In Promotion mode, also select the current tier.
about.li4: Enter training speed and speedup days, then click Calculate.
about.note: * Troop count input mode is not used, and the training speed (%) you enter is applied automatically.

form.modeTroops: Troop Count → Calculate Required Speedup Days

warn.noData: No matching data found. Please check the tier / mode.

errors.noData: No data available for the selected conditions.

result.caption: Only totals based on the entered conditions are shown.
